scripts.check:syntax: node -e "const { execFileSync } = require('child_process'); const { readdirSync, statSync } = require('fs'); const { join } = require('path'); const files = []; const walk = (dir) => { for (const name of readdirSync(dir)) { const full = join(dir, name); if (full.includes('node_modules')) continue; const stat = statSync(full); if (stat.isDirectory()) walk(full); else if (full.endsWith('.js')) files.push(full); } }; walk(process.cwd()); for (const file of files) execFileSync(process.execPath, ['--check', file], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
